plugin_desc: Accedian metro-Ethernet performance-assurance SNMP collection (ACD-DESC-MIB, IANA PEN 22420). Beyond standard IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic (ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, ifXTable) and system uptime (sysUpTime), it collects the Accedian private scalar OID for chassis CPU utilization (acdDescCpuUsageCurrent, reported directly as a percentage). Memory utilization has no scalar object in the device-description MIB and the only temperature reading is a per-SFP diagnostics table requiring row-level filtering that the SNMP input cannot normalize, so memory/temperature/fan/power are N/A. Supported brands/models — Accedian SkyLIGHT performance modules and MetroNID / Nano / Plus metro-Ethernet performance-assurance nodes (enterprise 22420).
name: NetworkService

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart (sysUpTime). By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the Accedian appliance and identify potential reboot or failure issues.

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Current CPU utilization of the Accedian performance-assurance node (ACD-DESC-MIB acdDescCpuUsageCurrent, Gauge32 0..100 reported directly as a percentage). Sustained high CPU means the node is near its processing capacity for traffic regulation and performance measurement.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_total_incoming_traffic
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of total bytes received by the entire device over the past 5 minutes, summed from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counters.

metrics.name: device_total_outgoing_traffic
metrics.description: This metric represents the average rate of total bytes sent by the entire device over the past 5 minutes, summed from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counters.
